title: rubus × digeneus
intro: Rubus × digeneus, also known as thimbleberry, is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Rubus parviflorus and Rubus laciniatus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rubus × digeneus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or jam, with the latter being a popular use in traditional medicine to support digestive health.
